case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS MAR STEVEN Y et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,322.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT MAR STEVEN Y MAR NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAR STEVEN Y MAR NANCY
